allow: Bash(docker compose exec backend curl -s http://host.docker.internal:8080/health --connect-timeout 5)
Bash(docker compose exec backend python -c "import requests; r = requests.get\(''http://host.docker.internal:8080/health'', timeout=5\); print\(f''Status: {r.status_code}''\); print\(r.text\)")
Bash(docker compose exec backend bash -c "cd /app/chatdku/chatdku/ingestion && python load_chroma.py --nodes_path /app/chatdku/chatdku/backend/data/nodes.json --collection_name chatdku_docs")

Bash(docker compose exec backend bash -c "cd /app/chatdku/chatdku/ingestion && python load_chroma.py --nodes_path /app/chatdku/chatdku/backend/data/nodes.json --collection_name chatdku_docs 2>&1 | grep -v ''RequestsDependencyWarning\\|UnsupportedFieldAttributeWarning''")
